scenario.name: Registrar UAC Fixed AOR
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK-[call_number] From: <sip:user@sip.example.com>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:user@sip.example.com> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:user@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
